creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
Created attachment 192679
validator-CGI.patch

It appears that p5-CGI is the newer version of p5-CGI.pm, as when attempting to look up p5-CGI.pm on CPAN, it goes to p5-CGI instead. I am unsure if there needs to be a message about this in UPDATING, since the package system thinks that p5-CGI is a downgrade from p5-CGI.pm due to the latter having a PORTEPOCH of 1.
